name: Treaty-Based Position Penalty Waiver

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers who failed to file Form 8833 but can show their failure was not due to willful neglect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can request a waiver of the $1,000 (or $10,000 for C-corps) penalty for failing to disclose treaty-based return positions by demonstrating reasonable cause and good faith.
